title: Optimized Speedrun
description: This Modpack Adds Speedrun Utilities like timer etc
body: its 1.16.1 only best for speedruners, if you speedrun a lot in minecraft this modpack adds timer, gold highlightor, optimization mods, fast skin load, some hud stuff and resource packs like low fire, no pumpkin blur, clear water etc. i only recommend this if you speedun otherwise its prob useless and annoying for you
